sections.title: Welcome to AgentLog
sections.subtitle: Intelligent AI Agent Orchestration Platform
sections.content: AgentLog is a comprehensive platform that enables you to create, deploy, and manage AI agents capable of automating complex workflows. Build sophisticated automation systems using multiple AI models, integrate with GitHub, Slack, and other services, all through an intuitive web interface.

highlights.title: Multiple AI Models
highlights.description: Support for GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and more AI models for diverse capabilities

highlights.title: GitHub & Slack Integration
highlights.description: Native integration with GitHub for code operations and Slack for team communication

highlights.title: Secure & Scalable
highlights.description: Enterprise-ready with secure API key management and team collaboration features

sections.title: Platform Architecture
sections.subtitle: Understanding the Building Blocks
sections.content: AgentLog is built around six core concepts that work together to create a comprehensive agent orchestration platform:

concepts.title: Teams
concepts.description: Groups of agents working together on related tasks
concepts.details: Organize agents into teams for better management, shared resources, and collaborative workflows. Teams can have shared memory, token limits, and access permissions.
examples: Marketing Team: Content creation, social media, analytics
Support Team: Ticket handling, knowledge base, escalation
Development Team: Code review, testing, deployment

concepts.title: Agents
concepts.description: AI-powered workers that execute tasks autonomously
concepts.details: Intelligent agents that can understand instructions, make decisions, and perform complex tasks using available functions. Each agent has its own personality, memory, and skill set.
examples: Social Media Manager: Schedules posts, responds to comments, analyzes engagement
Data Analyst: Processes data, generates reports, identifies trends
Customer Service Rep: Handles inquiries, provides support, escalates issues

concepts.title: Templates
concepts.description: Pre-configured blueprints for common agent types
concepts.details: Ready-to-use agent configurations with optimized prompts, function selections, and settings for specific use cases. Templates provide a quick starting point for common scenarios.
examples: GitHub Issue Manager: Triages and manages repository issues
Slack Community Moderator: Manages channels and user interactions
Weather Reporter: Provides daily weather updates and alerts

concepts.title: Executions
concepts.description: Individual task runs performed by agents
concepts.details: Every time an agent performs a task, it creates an execution record. These provide detailed logs, results, token usage, and performance metrics for monitoring and optimization.
examples: Scheduled Report Generation: Daily analytics report creation
Event-Triggered Response: Automatic response to GitHub issues
Manual Task Execution: On-demand agent task performance

concepts.title: Functions & Skills
concepts.description: Pre-built capabilities that agents can use
concepts.details: A comprehensive library of functions that enable agents to interact with external services, process data, and perform complex operations without custom code.
examples: GitHub Integration: Create issues, manage PRs, analyze repositories
Slack Operations: Send messages, manage channels, read conversations
Weather Services: Get forecasts, track conditions, send alerts

concepts.title: AI Models
concepts.description: The AI engines that power agent intelligence
concepts.details: Choose from various AI models like GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, and others. Each model has different capabilities, costs, and performance characteristics suitable for different use cases.
examples: GPT-4: Advanced reasoning and complex task handling
Claude: Strong analytical and creative capabilities
Gemini: Multimodal processing and fast responses

sections.title: How It Works
sections.subtitle: From Idea to Automation
sections.content: Creating and deploying AI agents is a simple 4-step process:

steps.title: Choose a Template
steps.description: Start with a pre-built template or create from scratch
steps.details: Browse our template library to find configurations that match your needs, or start with a blank template for full customization.

steps.title: Configure Your Agent
steps.details: Define your agent's role, personality, and capabilities. Select functions it can use and configure its decision-making parameters.

steps.title: Set Up Integrations
steps.description: Connect to external services and APIs
steps.details: Configure API keys and permissions for services your agent will interact with, such as GitHub, Slack, or weather APIs.

steps.title: Deploy & Monitor
steps.description: Launch your agent and track its performance
steps.details: Activate your agent to start working autonomously. Monitor executions, track performance, and optimize based on results.

sections.title: Why Choose AgentLog?
sections.subtitle: Built for Everyone
sections.content: AgentLog makes AI agent development accessible to everyone, from business users to technical teams:

sections.title: Ready to Get Started?
sections.subtitle: Your AI agent journey begins here

actions.title: Quick Start Guide
